stories.title: FY2027 Budget Public Input Period Open Through April 24
stories.excerpt: Durham County is accepting public comment on the proposed FY2027 budget through April 24. Residents can submit written comments online or attend the public hearing on April 24 at 7 PM.

stories.title: Durham Public Schools Requests $412M in County Funding for FY2027
stories.excerpt: The DPS Board of Education has formally submitted its FY2027 budget request to the county, seeking $412 million — a 6.2% increase — to cover staffing, facilities, and mental health services across 56 campuses.

stories.title: County Manager to Present FY2027 Budget Recommendation on May 19
stories.excerpt: County Manager Kimberly M. Sowell will present the recommended FY2027 operating and capital budget to the Board of Commissioners on May 19 at 9 AM. The public hearing is scheduled for April 24.

stories.title: Planning Commission Reviews Major Southside Rezoning Proposal
stories.excerpt: The City-County Planning Commission will consider a rezoning application for 14 acres in the Southside neighborhood at its April 23 meeting, with advocates citing concerns about displacement of longtime residents.

stories.title: BOCC Votes to Move Forward on $80M Affordable Housing Bond
stories.excerpt: The Board of Commissioners voted 4-1 Monday to place an $80 million affordable housing bond on the November ballot, citing a critical shortage of units affordable to residents earning below 60% of area median income.

stories.title: GoTriangle Secures $38M Federal Grant for Durham–Chapel Hill BRT
stories.excerpt: GoTriangle announced a $38 million federal Small Starts grant for the Durham–Chapel Hill Bus Rapid Transit corridor, accelerating construction of dedicated bus lanes on NC-54 connecting Duke to UNC.

stories.title: Durham County Expands Crisis Intervention Program Countywide
stories.excerpt: Following a successful pilot in East Durham, the county is expanding its co-responder crisis intervention program — pairing mental health clinicians with law enforcement — to all patrol districts beginning May 1.

stories.title: Ellerbe Creek Greenway Extension Breaks Ground This Weekend
stories.excerpt: Durham Parks & Recreation will break ground Saturday on a 1.4-mile Ellerbe Creek Greenway extension linking Northgate Park to the Falls Lake Trail, funded through the 2022 parks bond.

stories.title: Durham County Seeks Applicants for Housing Advisory Board
stories.excerpt: Durham County is recruiting residents to serve on the Housing Advisory Board, which advises commissioners on affordable housing policy. Applications are due May 1 at dconc.gov.

stories.title: Free Vaccination Clinic Scheduled for June 9 at Durham Human Services
stories.excerpt: The Durham County Health Department will host a free vaccination clinic on June 9 from 10 AM to 2 PM at 414 E. Main St., offering flu, COVID-19, and routine adult immunizations. No appointment required.
